invoiceVendorName.description: Vendor name exactly as it appears on the invoice. Pass through verbatim. Preserve casing, punctuation, suffixes (Inc, LLC, GmbH, etc.).

poVendorName.description: Vendor name exactly as it appears on the matching purchase order. Pass through verbatim. Preserve casing, punctuation, and corporate suffixes.

relationship.description: Relationship between the invoice vendor and the PO vendor. same_entity: different legal names, same company (DBA, abbreviation, translation, with/without suffix). parent_subsidiary: one is the legal parent of the other. affiliate: both share a common parent or are under common control. acquired_or_merged: one acquired or merged with the other. predecessor_successor: rebrand or legal name change. unrelated: no documented relationship. look_alike_or_typosquat: deliberate fraudulent look-alike. unknown: insufficient information.

flag.description: Recommended downstream action. approve: legitimate relationship verified with high confidence. review: ambiguous, needs human review. reject: likely fraud or unrelated entity.

confidence.description: Confidence in the relationship classification, based on quality and corroboration of sources.

reasoning.description: Concise explanation of how the relationship was determined. Reference specific corporate facts (acquisition year, parent/subsidiary structure, rebrand) discovered via web search.

sources.description: URLs of authoritative sources used to determine the relationship (SEC filings, official corporate pages, press releases, reputable news). At least 1 if relationship != unknown.
